programme.desc: Il volo ASA 529 perde una delle sue quattro eliche mentre è in viaggio verso Gulfport, Mississippi.

programme.desc: Il volo PSA 182 si scontra con un Cessna e entrambi gli aerei precipitano.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il motore destro del volo Tuninter 1153 si guasta improvvisamente.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo RIA 593 da Mosca a Hong Kong precipita dal cielo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo SAS 686 decolla nella fitta nebbia dell’aeroporto di Linate, a Milano.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Cruel Skies” ripercorre quattro disastri aerei cruciali e mancate tragedie.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Partnair 394 è in crociera a 22.000 piedi quando inizia improvvisamente a precipitare verso il mare.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo FedEx 705 ha appena terminato la fase di salita da Memphis quando inizia l’attacco.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Si sentono colpi di arma da fuoco nella cabina del volo Pacific Southwest Airlines 1771.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Korean Air Cargo 8509 si schianta in un campo a nord-est di Londra.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il motore destro del volo Tuninter 1153 si guasta improvvisamente.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il racconto dello schianto del volo American Eagle 4184 vicino a Roselawn, Indiana.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un traghetto greco si schianta contro una gigantesca roccia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Crossair 3597 è in fase di avvicinamento finale, ma poco prima dell’atterraggio non trova la pista.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Otto giocatori del Manchester United muoiono in un noto incidente aereo a Monaco.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Adam Air 574 entra in una tempesta e si schianta in mare.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo TAM Airlines 3054 sfreccia lungo la pista ad alta velocità e si schianta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Due aerei si scontrano in volo e si schiantano in una tranquilla periferia di Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I piloti riescono a far atterrare d’emergenza il loro 747 danneggiato in Alaska.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Pan Am 103 esplode improvvisamente nei cieli sopra Lockerbie, in Scozia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Avianca Airlines 52 sta volando in un cielo sereno quando viene messo nel suo primo circuito di attesa

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una notte intensa all’aeroporto di Los Angeles, mentre il volo US Air 1493 è in fase di atterraggio.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I piloti riescono a compiere uno degli atterraggi più straordinari della storia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Arrow Air 1285 fa rifornimento e pochi secondi dopo il decollo si schianta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Air Inter 148 inizia la discesa verso l’aeroporto di Strasburgo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un Boeing 767 dell’Ethiopian Airlines dirottato rimane senza carburante vicino alle Isole Comore.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un piccolo problema meccanico si trasforma rapidamente in un’emergenza totale.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Per trovare la causa dello schianto del volo South African Airlines 295, dovettero scavare a fondo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Uno dei disastri più allarmanti nella storia dell’aviazione.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Durante il trasferimento di bimbi vietnamiti orfani da Saigon verso la salvezza, tutto va terribilmente storto

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo PSA 182 si scontra con un Cessna e entrambi gli aerei precipitano.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Durante il tranquillo volo 009 verso l’Australia, del fumo inizia a riempire la cabina dell'aereo passeggeri.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Fatti a Pezzi” ripercorre alcuni dei più spettacolari disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Korean Air 801 si schianta a cinque chilometri dalla destinazione.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un 737 militare che trasporta passeggeri di alto rango si schianta a chilometri dalla destinazione prevista.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un forte tonfo proviene dalla fusoliera e i piloti interrompono il decollo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Durante condizioni meteorologiche estreme, un elicottero compie un viaggio di routine.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Difetto Fatale” rivisita alcuni dei più inquietanti disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Delta Airlines 191 raggiunge la soglia dell’aeroporto di Dallas Fort Worth.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Flash Airlines 604 si schianta nel Mar Rosso pochi minuti dopo il decollo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo 708 sta attraversando un uragano moderato quando l’aereo precipita.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un comandante lotta per mantenere l’aereo in volo e improvvisamente precipita verso il suolo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un pilota teme che la forte nevicata possa ritardare ulteriormente la partenza.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un aereo che trasporta un gruppo di scolari è su una rotta di collisione con un aereo cargo della DHL.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una rivisitazione di cinque disastri aerei fondamentali e dei cambiamenti che hanno provocato.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Minuti dopo il decollo, la coda del gigantesco Boeing 747 si stacca.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una delle collisioni aeree più terrificanti della storia avviene sopra l’India nel 1996.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Pochi istanti dopo il decollo, i piloti del volo Birgenair 301 vengono bombardati da allarmi confusi.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: L’equipaggio e i passeggeri a bordo del volo British Airways 111 sanno che qualcosa non va per niente bene.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo United Airlines 232 subisce un grave guasto quando uno dei motori esplode.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I piloti sono diretti a Phoenix, in Arizona, ma prima devono trovare la loro pista.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Air France 358 prende fuoco quando esce di pista.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I voli United Airlines 585 e US Air 585 si schiantano a pochi anni di distanza l’uno dall’altro.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.title: Special Edition
programme.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programme.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programme.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programme.title: History in the Frame
programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Youthful China
programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Pixel Collage
programme.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.

programme.desc: Documentaries in this slot are rebroadcasts of our most-viewed and most popular stories of the season. programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S01:E10 - Africa's Most Dangerous
programme.desc: Ivan Carter investigates the most dangerous animal in Africa.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E35 - Prince Charles At 50 Heir To Sadness
programme.desc: After Diana's death, everyone's attention turned to Charles, who was not only a widower and a dad but also next in line for the throne. This show takes a closer look at how he got along with his sons, his longtime love Camilla, and what his future might look like as King. Royal experts David Starkey and Anthony Holden share their insights.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E32 - Prince William Royal Teenage Behind The Scenes
programme.desc: Who's the real person beneath all those glamorous royal photos? This intriguing documentary takes a look into the life of the young man behind the public image.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E03 - Cunning Copulation
programme.desc: Finding a mate, building a nest, and raising kids are all part of the whole reproductive behavior thing. But it’s not as easy as it sounds. First, you’ve got to sift through lots of possible partners to find the one with the best genes to keep your family line going. Nesting involves finding some space and then guarding it fiercely, while raising the little ones takes loads of energy as you have to feed, teach, and keep them safe until they grow up. This episode dives into the ins and outs of how creatures go about their reproductive business.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E01 - Three Stories, One Bear
programme.desc: Michigan U.S.A. conservation officers investigate a bear killed during the season's opening weekend; a suspicious bag of trash at a state park; the reason why every successful bear hunter has to turn in a tooth from his kill.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E02 - Elevated Charges
programme.desc: It's a late night for two Michigan U.S.A. conservation officers as an investigation into a hunting blind on federal property turns into much more. The area is also home to a once nearly extinct bird that is now making a comeback.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E13 - Hunt and Capture Saddam Hussein
programme.desc: Ten years ago, thousands of US and Coalition forces personnel, ranging from elite soldiers to reservists, found themselves in the middle of two conflicts that required an entirely different approach to warfare than they had previously experienced. From special forces units securing vital points of strategic interest and capturing key individuals in Afghanistan. This episode of CQB takes a close look at how special operations were integrated into regular units and how they fought through many close quarter combat situations with a combination of intelligence, high-tech weaponry and surveillance technologies to find and capture Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E01 - Wardens Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: Wardens: Case Files offers a glimpse into the remarkable stories of seasoned wildlife officers. It will transport viewers into the heart of the action, immersing them in the thrill of the chase and the satisfaction of justice served.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E09 - Bighorn Range
programme.desc: Bighorn sheep are captured and translocated in the mountains of Nevada.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E10 - Preserving A Predator
programme.desc: Conservationists capture and translocate lions across Africa to replenish a once-extinct population.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: A Very Modern Romance
programme.desc: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry share similar interests and seem like a perfect match. Both have faced tough times growing up but have come out on top. Now they're winning together. This hour-long special, featuring a chat with author Andrew Morton, explores the social backdrop that makes their bold marriage fit right in with today's British Royal Family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E35 - Prince Charles At 50 Heir To Sadness
programme.desc: After Diana's death, everyone's attention turned to Charles, who was not only a widower and a dad but also next in line for the throne. This show takes a closer look at how he got along with his sons, his longtime love Camilla, and what his future might look like as King. Royal experts David Starkey and Anthony Holden share their insights.

This episode dives into the ins and outs of how creatures go about their reproductive business.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E13 - Hunt and Capture Saddam Hussein
programme.desc: Ten years ago, thousands of US and Coalition forces personnel, ranging from elite soldiers to reservists, found themselves in the middle of two conflicts that required an entirely different approach to warfare than they had previously experienced. From special forces units securing vital points of strategic interest and capturing key individuals in Afghanistan. This episode of CQB takes a close look at how special operations were integrated into regular units and how they fought through many close quarter combat situations with a combination of intelligence, high-tech weaponry and surveillance technologies to find and capture Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E01 - Wardens Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: Wardens: Case Files offers a glimpse into the remarkable stories of seasoned wildlife officers. It will transport viewers into the heart of the action, immersing them in the thrill of the chase and the satisfaction of justice served.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E09 - Bighorn Range
programme.desc: Bighorn sheep are captured and translocated in the mountains of Nevada.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E10 - Preserving A Predator
programme.desc: Conservationists capture and translocate lions across Africa to replenish a once-extinct population.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: A Very Modern Romance
programme.desc: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry share similar interests and seem like a perfect match. Both have faced tough times growing up but have come out on top. Now they're winning together. This hour-long special, featuring a chat with author Andrew Morton, explores the social backdrop that makes their bold marriage fit right in with today's British Royal Family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E35 - Prince Charles At 50 Heir To Sadness
programme.desc: After Diana's death, everyone's attention turned to Charles, who was not only a widower and a dad but also next in line for the throne. This show takes a closer look at how he got along with his sons, his longtime love Camilla, and what his future might look like as King. Royal experts David Starkey and Anthony Holden share their insights.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E32 - Prince William Royal Teenage Behind The Scenes
programme.desc: Who's the real person beneath all those glamorous royal photos? This intriguing documentary takes a look into the life of the young man behind the public image.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E03 - Cunning Copulation
programme.desc: Finding a mate, building a nest, and raising kids are all part of the whole reproductive behavior thing. But it’s not as easy as it sounds. First, you’ve got to sift through lots of possible partners to find the one with the best genes to keep your family line going. Nesting involves finding some space and then guarding it fiercely, while raising the little ones takes loads of energy as you have to feed, teach, and keep them safe until they grow up. This episode dives into the ins and outs of how creatures go about their reproductive business.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E01 - Three Stories, One Bear
programme.desc: Michigan U.S.A. conservation officers investigate a bear killed during the season's opening weekend; a suspicious bag of trash at a state park; the reason why every successful bear hunter has to turn in a tooth from his kill.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E02 - Elevated Charges
programme.desc: It's a late night for two Michigan U.S.A. conservation officers as an investigation into a hunting blind on federal property turns into much more. The area is also home to a once nearly extinct bird that is now making a comeback.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E13 - Hunt and Capture Saddam Hussein
programme.desc: Ten years ago, thousands of US and Coalition forces personnel, ranging from elite soldiers to reservists, found themselves in the middle of two conflicts that required an entirely different approach to warfare than they had previously experienced. From special forces units securing vital points of strategic interest and capturing key individuals in Afghanistan. This episode of CQB takes a close look at how special operations were integrated into regular units and how they fought through many close quarter combat situations with a combination of intelligence, high-tech weaponry and surveillance technologies to find and capture Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E32 - Prince William Royal Teenage Behind The Scenes
programme.desc: Who's the real person beneath all those glamorous royal photos? This intriguing documentary takes a look into the life of the young man behind the public image.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: A Very Modern Romance
programme.desc: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry share similar interests and seem like a perfect match. Both have faced tough times growing up but have come out on top. Now they're winning together. This hour-long special, featuring a chat with author Andrew Morton, explores the social backdrop that makes their bold marriage fit right in with today's British Royal Family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E34 - Prince William And Prince Harry The Next Royal Generation
programme.desc: Prince William and Prince Harry, along with their friends, got as much media attention as today’s pop stars, fashion icons, and movie celebs. This documentary explores how this affected their personal lives and friendships, showcasing how they managed their fame alongside their royal responsibilities.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E38 - HM The Queen A Remarkable Life
programme.desc: The most notable woman in modern times has to be our Late Queen, Elizabeth II. She ruled for 70 years, the longest reign in British history. Once a princess who wasn't supposed to be queen, Elizabeth II led the country to thrive after World War II and became a steady presence in our changing world. In a thousand years of British monarchy, Elizabeth II is likely one of the most outstanding monarchs ever.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E04 - Battle Plans
programme.desc: Surviving in the wild often means being able to fight and win. This fighting strategy is called agonism and is used to set ranks, get resources, claim territory, and attract partners. There's no certainty in the wild, but animals that get good at agonism have a better shot at living to see another day.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E03 - Chasing The Big One
programme.desc: Montana wardens spend a week tracking the killer of two out-of-season deer; anonymous tips and eye witness accounts keep the wardens hot on a trail filled with many twists and turns.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E04 - Buggying Out
programme.desc: Fourth of July weekend in Silver Lake State Park is a non-stop party; Michigan conservation officers help patrol the park during this busy time and make keeping the peace their number one priority.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E02 - Moose is Loose and Lost Coast
programme.desc: A surprise guest shows up at the elementary school, giving everyone quite a scare. Meanwhile, a sneaky Angler is on the prowl, putting a twist on "catch and release." It's up to the Game Wardens to stop him.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E03 - Operation Long Tooth and Happy Kids
programme.desc: An elusive smuggler evades Game Wardens from different backgrounds. The smuggler, once discovered, has an exotic tusk in his possession. Then a story of how a dog and two amused kids leads to a bust. It's the job of Game Wardens to solve what has transpired.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S01:E01 - Meet Island Air
programme.desc: Thousands of outdoor adventure seekers flock to Kodiak Island to experience the wilds of Alaska through hunting, fishing and wildlife viewing expeditions, and Island Air Service makes those once-in-a-lifetime quests a reality. Flying in fog, rain, snow or sleet and moving outdoorsmen, locals, supplies and materials to the farthest corners of the island, It's all in a day's run for a Kodiak bush pilot and the staff and crew of Island Air.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S01:E02 - Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While on a routine sightseeing flight, a massive storm has the pilots fighting to keep their passengers safe.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E41 - Fergie The Downfall Of A Modern Duchess
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson, once known as the Duchess of York, seemed to have everything, but her world turned upside down when her name got caught up in a big scandal.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E34 - Prince William And Prince Harry The Next Royal Generation
programme.desc: Prince William and Prince Harry, along with their friends, got as much media attention as today’s pop stars, fashion icons, and movie celebs. programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: The North Atlantic Ocean is generous with her bounty, until she takes a life in return. Mark braves the deep seas on the most dangerous day of the lobster fishing season.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: A catastrophic earthquake, a mesmerizing avalanche, a destructive tornado, and an unintentional smashup derby on icy highways; our experts weigh in on these viral videos as people get caught off guard by the sudden and powerful forces of nature.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: El Niño is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Niño occurs.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Tornadoes; they are the embodiment of severe weather. In this episode we show some of the most terrifying weather caught on camera; from surviving a direct hit to a tornado in a typhoon.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Volcanic ash engulfing a town, a massive firenado in California - just some of the viral weather videos caught on camera in this episode of Captured, as Vicious Winds take center stage.

programme.desc: Mark & Jaclyn chase extreme winter weather as Nor’easters hammer Atlantic Canada.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: A mysterious fever overwhelms Mark as he struggles to fulfil a childhood dream. He must use every ounce of inner strength to journey to the mouth of hell, and make it out alive.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: In the porous limestone of Canada’s West Coast, great forces are at work under the ground, building and eroding the underground into fantastic shapes. In this episode we’ll witness George’s explorations of these massive underground cave systems.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Stormchasing developed in Australia in the same period – the 1990s – as it developed in the American Midwest. In the first week of December – the height of storm season in Australia, we plan to travel with Jimmy Deguara, the most experienced of Australian stormchasers.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption; both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: It is time for “Angry Planet” to do a serious desert episode. What better place to do it than this fabled city in the middle of the mighty Sahara Desert.This almost mythical place really does exist. And it really is still possible to travel there by camel caravan, riding the infamous “Ships of the Desert”. Extreme heat, dehydration, possible sand storms, frigid night temperatures and desert predators are our potential companions for the trip.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Geoorge explores Java at the heart of the Ring of Fire.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: “Angry Planet” is there as 3 storms make landfall as hurricanes in the US.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: No-one creates eco-disasters on quite the scale of the former Soviet Union. In Uzbekistan, the Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, has seen its waters diverted, so that it has shrunk to 1/6 its previous size. In Crimea, a mountain has been carved into a james bondian submarine base. In northern Ukraine, the Chernobyl nuclear site has been reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George returns to the “Fin Del Mundo” at the southern tip of Argentina, this time to sail on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving the stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps out in the Antarctic snow, and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off the melting glaciers.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Un uomo anziano viene colpito e ucciso mentre era in viaggio. Gli omicidi casuali sono tra i più difficili da risolvere, ma la balistica offre un vantaggio agli investigatori.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1969, l'operatrice telefonica venticinquenne Diane Maxwell venne stuprata e uccisa. Suo fratello promise che avrebbe scoperto il responsabile e assicurato l'assassino alla giustizia.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1991, Dorothy Donovan fu assassinata nella sua casa a Dover, Delaware e la polizia era scettica quando suo figlio Charles Holden dichiarò che era stata uccisa da un autostoppista a cui lui aveva dato un passaggio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una studentessa universitaria scomparve senza lasciare traccia, i compagni di studi si preoccuparono.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Uno scheletro umano venne scoperto nelle paludi della Carolina del Nord. Quando gli investigatori seppero che era morta da 18 mesi, capirono che sarebbe stato difficile scoprire chi fosse, tanto meno chi l'avesse uccisa.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il corpo di una giovane attraente fu trovato a un miglio dalla sua auto abbandonata. La polizia si allarmò particolarmente quando si rese conto che la vittima era venuta da loro per aiuto solo due settimane prima dopo un evento di rabbia al volante.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una bamba di nove anni sparisce, polizia e volontari passano settimane a cercarla. La visione di un medium porta a un campo dove si scopre il corpo insieme a ciò che gli inquirenti sperano siano prove adeguate ad aiutarli a trovare il killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il rapinatore sparò quando la famiglia di quattro persone entrò in casa, uccidendone due e ferendo gli altri. Aprì alcuni cassetti per far sembrare che si trattasse di una rapina, ma la scena del delitto era stata chiaramente preparata.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2000, Ken, il marito di Kristine Fitzhugh, la trovò morta in fondo alle scale della loro casa a Palo Alto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un dottorando dell'Università Statale del Michigan scomparve e venne creduto morto. Con l'aiuto di un professore di scienze geologiche, la polizia sperava di trovare del "marcio" sul suo assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La mattina prima di Natale, una studentessa universitaria fu rapita dal parcheggio del suo appartamento.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives search for the bombers of two churches in Illinois, hoping that the materials used in the remnants of the handmade bombs will offer the clues to catch the culprits.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La vittima fu violentata e pugnalata a morte sulla spiaggia. Vicino al corpo venne ritrovato un paio di scarpe da tennis maschili. La polizia era sicura che se avesse trovato l'uomo delle scarpe, avrebbe trovato anche chi aveva commesso il delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una studentessa universitaria risulta scomparsa, la polizia crede che l'indagine sarà come tante altre. Ma quando scoprono schizzi di sangue nella camera da letto del suo ragazzo, capiscono che questo caso sarà diverso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fifteen years later, DNA technology leads to justice for a murdered woman and her savagely beaten 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una giovane e attraente parrucchiera fu violentata e uccisa nel suo salone di bellezza. Le prove sul luogo del delitto non corrispondevano a nessuno dei sospettati e, dopo l'indagine iniziale, il caso rimase irrisolto per dieci anni.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il 12 maggio 1994, Crystal Perry fu brutalmente assassinata nella sua casa a Bridgton, nel Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32 anni, fu dichiarato colpevole di omicidio.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Quando una donna di 79 anni viene trovata uccisa a casa sua, gli investigatori sospettano inizialmente il marito o un vicino violento. I bossoli dei proiettili ritrovati sulla scena e un database high-tech rivelano l'improbabile assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Un addetto di 18 anni che lavorava in un condominio sul lungomare viene trovato brutalmente assassinato. Gli analisti utilizzano la nuovissima tecnologia del DNA mitocondriale per dimostrare l'identità dell'assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A seguito di un incendio, gli investigatori devono riesaminare una morte insolita, il che significa riesumare la vittima che era stata sepolta anni fa.

programme.desc: Un appassionato di crimine collega una sconosciuta dello Utah a un caso di persone scomparse dell'Ohio.

programme.desc: Nel 2008, l'immobiliarista del Colorado Alan Helmick fu trovato colpito a morte a casa della moglie Miriam, che diventò quindi la principale sospettata.

programme.title: Forensic Files II

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Un veterano di guerra di 70 anni viene trovato morto sulla sua barca dopo una brutta tempesta. I detective scoprono che è stato ucciso durante un tentativo di rapina dopo aver vinto 400 dollari giocando a Keno.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Un uomo viene trovato morto con le lettere F, e e D scritte sul petto. Con poche altre prove, la polizia usa questi segni criptici per ottenere risposte.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Quando un marine di 23 anni muore nella sua stanza, i dottori credono che sia stato un attacco di cuore. Ma dopo aver trovato l'arsenico negli organi, sua moglie viene accusata di omicidio. Un avvocato scaltro e test tossicologici scoprono la verità.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Un agente assicurativo viene ucciso nel suo ufficio in pieno giorno, ma la polizia fa difficoltà a trovare le impronte digitali o l'arma del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: I pazienti dell'ospedale di Clarksburg, West Virginia, continuano a morire con bassi livelli di glicemia.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre competono per un viaggio a Las Vegas mentre preparano la festa di anniversario di una confraternita.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 12 chef rimanenti sono sfidati a impressionare il giudice chef Michael Cimarusti.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre hanno il compito di ricreare i piatti dal menu gastropub di Gordon.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gordon sfida gli chef ad abbinare otto tagli di maiale con otto parti del corpo di un maiale.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I concorrenti servono un pasto di cinque portate all'ambasciatore UNICEF Angie Harmon e ad altri VIP.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Due rapper danno istruzioni alle squadre per creare i propri menu.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli altri otto chef partecipano all'annuale prova di degustazione alla cieca.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Un concorrente ha la possibilità di presentare un piatto per il calendario di Hell’s Kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Tra gli ospiti a cena c’è l'attrice e l'ambasciatore della celebrità di Oxfam, Minnie Driver.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I restanti concorrenti cucinano versioni gourmet di street food.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La leggenda dei fumetti Stan Lee si siede al tavolo dello chef.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Termina un servizio a cena impegnativo con solo due chef rimasti a contendersi il premio finale.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La gara di cucina raggiunge il suo culmine.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay divide gli chef in due squadre di uomini e donne per la loro prima sfida.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Un risotto mal riuscito potrebbe segnare la fine per uno sfortunato concorrente.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef realizzano le ricette stampate sul retro delle loro giacche da servire a ospiti VIP.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: L’eliminazione di Marta ha lasciato nello sconforto le cuoche della brigata rossa che si schierano contro Monica: quest’ultima capisce di non essere ben voluta dalla sua squadra e non perde occasione per manifestarlo.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: L’eliminazione di Marta ha lasciato nello sconforto le cuoche della brigata rossa che si schierano contro Monica: quest’ultima capisce di non essere ben voluta dalla sua squadra e non perde occasione per manifestarlo.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Sorge un nuovo sole sul ristorante di Hell’s Kitchen. I Sous chef raggiungono gli alloggi e comunicano alle due brigate di vestirsi in borghese.Oggi i cuochi non dovranno cucinare, qualcun altro lo farà per loro.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le brigate preparano piatti religiosi, con la rossa che vince. Nella prova individuale, i concorrenti usano due ingredienti con uno scelto tra rabarbaro, chorizo, salsa di soia e chicchi di caffè.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Sorge il sole e mentre i cuochi si svegliano negli alloggi, nel ristorante di Hell’s Kitchen si suona.Ospite d’eccezione, per la prova a squadre di oggi, è Manuel Agnelli, frontman degli Afterhours e giudice di X Factor.I cuochi dovranno ascoltare e indovinare i generi musicali dei brani che interpreterà al pianoforte Manuel: ogni squadra dovrà poi realizzare due piatti ispirandosi ai generi indovinati.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gordon sfida il team a fare catering ad una cerimonia di laurea.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre cucinano per la madre di Gordon, Helen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli animi si infiammano quando Gordon rimprovera le squadre di regredire piuttosto che progredire.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Questa sfida è ispirata all’opera italiana, e le squadre preparano pietanze italiane.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I team preparano una degustazione per una mostra canina.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Al servizio serale, i cuochi preparano pietanze per leggende della musica, tra cui Steven Tyler degli Aerosmith.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef in gara sono sfidati a creare piatti ispirati alla cucina indiana.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Il servizio serale è tenuto in onore di un gruppo di vigili del fuoco decorati.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre sono sfidate a creare i propri stuzzichini da aperitivo.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La sfida degli ultimi sei concorrenti è quello di creare un piatto con bistecche Omaha.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I concorrenti in gara preparano piatti gourmet per amanti del glamping.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Quali saranno i due chef in finale?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay sceglie il vincitore della gara di quest'anno.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Il vincitore della prima sfida andrà a cena con William Shatner.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Durante il servizio serale, un Gordon infuriato caccia un'intera squadra fuori dalla cucina.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef hanno il compito di abbinare le teste di pesce al resto del corpo correttamente.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre sono sfidate a creare portate con spaghetti, hamburger, pizza e maccheroni al formaggio.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre devono creare i piatti più deliziosi a base di formaggio al fine di vincere un'avventura in oceano.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef creano un servizio speciale a pranzo in onore di due enti di beneficenza gestiti dai vigili del fuoco di Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Questa volta, gli chef devono preparare un pasto greco

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: E’ il giorno della semifinale a Hell’s Kitchen: i 5 cuochi rimasti hanno conquistato le giacche nere e da questo momento, dovranno contare solo sulle proprie abilità per dimostrare a Chef Cracco di poter diventare un Executive Chef.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: La puntata inizia con un "triello" sulla pasta gourmet giudicato da Eleonora Cozzella. Mohamed vince e diventa executive chef. Erika e Tommaso si sfidano con il loro ingrediente preferito. Erika vince e va in finale contro Mohamed, creando un menu con una brigata di ex concorrenti e ospiti come Manuel Agnelli e Le Donatella.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Inizia una nuova edizione di Hell’s Kitchen.Chef Carlo Cracco si trova davanti un plotone di 20 nuovi cuochi che vogliono affrontare il percorso all’interno del suo ristorante. Di questi 20 solo 14 però possono entrare a far parte delle brigate rosse e blu. I 14 vincitori affrontano il primo servizio e la prima eliminazione.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: La prima prova che affrontano le due squadre vede protagoniste le erbe aromatiche e le ricette dello Chef Cristiano Tomei, una stella Michelin. Lo Chef sarà anche seduto al tavolo speciale durante il servizio.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: La prima prova di questa puntata vede protagonisti la Pina e il marito Emiliano Pepe. Dovranno cucinare un piatto famoso guidati dai cuochi delle due squadre.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Oggi, gli chef devono preparare un piatto usando una bevanda alcolica, chesia vino, birra o superalcolici.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Oggi, gli chef si trovano di fronte a una selezione di alimenti proteici esotici tra cui un alligatore.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La sfida di oggi è preparare una cena di bentornato per il liceo Calabasas.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef servono un pasto composto di sei portate per due associazioni di beneficenza.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu goes fishing and promises to be back in time for dinner. | Pingu and Pinga are playing with their toys. programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu has the day off of school and wants to enjoy his freedom rather than help his Mother. | Pingu gets into a little mischief after he finds a bow and arrow. | Pingu ignores a warning about flying his kite near his irritable neighbour’s house and has to try and get it back.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu discovers a magnet and decides to use it to trick his friend. | Pingu is playing with his boat on the water, but it keeps sinking because of a leaky hull. | After Pingu falls asleep while playing with his toys, he has a really sweet dream.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Thoughtless Pingu tries to play a trick on his Grandfather not realising how dangerous his trick is. | When Pingu and Pinga see a real plane fly over their igloo, they decide to build their own airplane. | Pingu is constantly annoying and playing tricks on Pinga until she almost starts to cry.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu sees a magic kit in the shop and really wants it. | Pingu discovers a large present on his birthday. He wants to open it but is told he has to wait. | When Father insists that Pingu put everything in its right place, Pingu gets organized.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu sees a picture in a book of a tower that goes to the sky and wants to build one just like it. | Pinga discovers a book about kingdoms and Pingu thinks that it would be great to be a king. | Pingu wants to bake his own cake.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: The arm on Pinga’s teddy bear comes off while Pingu plays with it. | When there are endless delays setting off in the snowmobile, Pingu goes on foot to help Grandfather. | Pingu has a bad day. He stumbles over some of his toys, has a bad journey to school, and can't answer the teacher’s questions.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Showing off, Pingu bets Pinga that he can shoot balls at a can better than she can. | Pingu is doing very badly at his sports day. When he stops to help a friend on the last event, it’s Pingu that wins top prize. | Pingu is delighted when he receives a Valentine’s Day card from Pingi.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu has to keep his sister, Pinga, out of trouble when she sleepwalks her way out of the igloo and through other penguin’s homes. | Pingu is bouncing on everything in the igloo, from his bed to the armchairs. | Pingu is teasing his sister and her favourite toy rabbit tumbles out of the window.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and Pinga are hanging up the washing. When a big gust of wind catches the towels, they give chase. | Watching a seagull in flight makes Pingu want to fly. | After Father shovels snow off his cart, Pingu does a little digging himself.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Father tries to make a table but spends most of his time keeping Pingu out of his toolbox. | When Pingu goes snowboarding with Robby, he wishes he was as good at jumps as his friend. | Grandfather tells Pingu about the moon and he desperately wants to visit.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and Pinga sleep in a tent and Pingu tries to scare her. | When Pinga has a case of the hiccups, Pingu tries to get rid of them by scaring his little sister. | When he takes Pingu on a fishing trip, it turns out that Father doesn’t always know best.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Everyone except Pingu seems to be entering the local Ice Sculpture Contest. | Pingu and Father are trying to inflate a balloon but it is proving harder than they thought. | Pingu and Pinga are driving Mother crazy with their incessant banging – they’ll use any surface as a drum!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu wants to get his flippers on Mother’s knitting machine. When she takes a rest, Pingu seizes his chance to knit up a storm! | It's bedtime but Pingu and Pinga are still outside playing. | Pingu and Pinga are playing tag. Pingu think he has given his sister the slip but finds himself stuck.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and Pinga find some stickers in their cereal box, and begin to label things. | Pingu knows that he’s in trouble when he breaks the igloo’s doorbell. | Robby is extremely good at balancing a fish on the end of his nose.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu drops a bottle of milk and it rolls into an icy ravine. | Pingu is excited to make pancakes. programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu discovers that the further he rolls his snowballs, the bigger they become. | Pingu uses a hose and funnel to play tricks on his family and friends. | Pingu wants to have a go on Grandfather’s potter’s wheel but his pottery is nowhere near as good as Grandfather’s.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: When Pingu and Pinga play too roughly, they ruin Mother’s new hat. | Pingu is first in line at the new snack stall. He casually drops the wrapper after he has eaten his treat and everyone copies him. | Pingu is a bit of a tearaway when it comes to sledging.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is jealous of the attention his sick sister is getting… so he pretends to be sick as well! | Pingu and Pinga decide to play a surprise joke on Mother by putting Pinga in an old box. | Pingu is invited to a birthday party but doesn’t want Pinga to go too.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu’s teacher is showing the class how to make papier-mâché shapes – and Pingu and his friends are impressed. | Pingu can’t get enough of his favourite fishy snacks. | Father gives Pingu a driving lesson but Pingu accidentally breaks the speed stick.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu really wants a new toy, but Mother won’t buy him any of the toys he shows her while shopping. | Pingu is charged with looking after the school pet. programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: When Pinga bumps her toe, Pingu has a great time wrapping her throbbing foot and making her giggle. | Pingu finds a magical flute, but no one seems to appreciate his noisy tooting… except the fish! | Pingi seems to prefer playing with Pingo than Pingu.

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Love Is All Around the World

programme.title: Rwar! The Dinos Are Sick
programme.desc: Roar! Treat us right away, Doctor Baby Shark! Oh no, it looks like the dinosaurs are sick. Doctor Baby Shark will swiftly treat them. Now, please come into the clinic~

programme.title: Pinkfong's Farm Animals
programme.desc: Welcome to Pinkfong’s farm! You're watching "Pinkfong’s Farm", fun and educational Animal Songs presented by Pinkfong! Learn all about different farm animals with all-new Pinkfong's Animal Songs!

programme.title: Baby Shark's WHY Songs
programme.desc: Why does poop come out? Why do loose teeth fall out? Let's find out about our bodies with Baby Shark!

programme.title: Reading Stories with Pinkfong

programme.title: Reading Stories with Pinkfong

programme.title: Pinkfong Dinosaur Musical Stories

programme.title: Mischievous Thief Baby Shark

programme.desc: Ouch, ouch, it hurts! Help me! I was running and playing outside today! Ouch! I got hurt while running fast and sliding down the slide. Mommy, Daddy! Please make it better so it doesn’t hurt anymore!

programme.title: Pinkfong!, Did you know that?

programme.title: Baby Shark Stole My Heart Again!
programme.desc: Baby Shark, the sparkling superstar of the universe! Thanks for loving us for 10 years—are you ready for even more songs and dances?

programme.title: Baby Shark Dinosaur Play

programme.desc: Oh no, it looks like you have a tooth injury, so you've come to the dentist! Dr. Baby Shark will take care of everything for you! Alright, let's start the treatment. Please open wide and say "Ahh"!

programme.title: Learn Colors with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Look what we found! Our friends have discovered mysterious, colorful dinosaur eggs! Place them in the magic incubator and watch them change colors. What kind of mighty dinosaurs will hatch from these rainbow eggs? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Catch the Thief Shark Family
programme.desc: Code Red! Code Red! The Thief Shark family has escaped from jail! Join Police Baby Shark on a thrilling chase to catch the naughty sharks hiding all over town. Suit up, Officer! It’s time for an arrest!

programme.title: Baby Shark Special Song

programme.title: Hogi's Hospital Play
programme.desc: Wonder Star friends are sick! Join Hogi and Forest as they become doctors and heal their friends!

programme.title: Baby Shark Hospital Play Song
programme.desc: Ta-da! Baby Shark Hospital Play is now open! Doctor Baby Shark is here to fix any boo-boo. Let's wash away the germs and get healthy with the catchy tunes of 'Baby Shark’s Hospital Play'! Next patient, please!

programme.title: Dance Adventure
programme.desc: Arrr-! Are you ready for a fun adventure? Come and let's sing and dance together! Arrr-!

programme.title: Kikipuppup
programme.desc: Meow Meow, Woof Woof! Bickering Again Today! Meet the cute rivals, Kiki & Puppo— and… Vex! A fun story about a cute cat and dog, sharing little laughs, heartwarming moments, and tiny bits of growing up every day!

programme.title: We Are Baby Doctors!
programme.desc: Cough, cough! Sniffle, sniffle! Help me, Doctor! I don’t feel well. Bebefinn and Minjee are having a 'Hospital Play' day! Don’t worry—Doctor Bebefinn and Minjee will make you feel all better with a magic touch. Let’s play doctor!

programme.title: Five Little Animals Dancing on the Farm
programme.desc: Join the Bebefinn family and meet five friendly farm animals! From cows and ducks to sheep, pigs, and bunnies—it’s time to wiggle, shake, and dance along! Are you ready to move like an animal?

programme.title: Making Pizza with Bebefinn!
programme.desc: Pineapple pizza or chocolate pizza? It’s time for the Bebefinn family’s special pizza-making adventure! What do you think it will taste like? Let’s use our imagination!

programme.desc: Code Red! Code Red! The Thief Shark family has escaped from jail! Join Police Baby Shark on a thrilling chase to catch the naughty sharks hiding all over town. Suit up, Officer! It’s time for an arrest!

programme.title: Pinkfong & Hogi: New Friend Ninimo
programme.desc: One day, Pinkfong’s magical powers and memories of home planet Staria slowly start to disappear, and a mysterious cat named Ninimo appears! But even without the magical powers and memories, Pinkfong discovers the magic of friendship in Wonderville.

programme.title: Pinkfong & Hogi: New Friend Ninimo
programme.desc: One day, Pinkfong’s magical powers and memories of home planet Staria slowly start to disappear, and a mysterious cat named Ninimo appears! But even without the magical powers and memories, Pinkfong discovers the magic of friendship in Wonderville.

programme.title: Ninimo is Sick
programme.desc: Ninimo has caught a cold! Become a doctor with Hogi and Forest to treat sick Ninimo!

programme.title: Bebefinn Weather Song
programme.desc: What’s the weather like today? Sunny, rainy, windy, or snowy—there are so many kinds of weather to explore! Let’s learn all about weather with Bebefinn!

programme.title: The Shark Family's Teeth Hurt!
programme.desc: Oh no! Mommy Shark has cavities, Daddy Shark has a broken tooth, and Big Brother Shark’s teeth have turned yellow! Doctor Baby Shark and friends are here to help make them healthy again!

programme.title: Happy 1st Birthday Bebefinn
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family.

programme.title: Happy New Year, Bebefinn
programme.desc: The Bebefinn family looks back on the year while flipping through their photo album. What fun things happened to the Bebefinn family this year? It was a happy year because everyone was together. Let’s fill the new year with even more sweet and happy moments with the Bebefinn family!

programme.title: We are Construction Vehicles
programme.desc: Oh no, the bridge has collapsed! Let’s head to the construction site with Hoi and his team of construction vehicles!

programme.title: Baby Shark: I Love You Super-Duper!
programme.desc: I love you, I love you, I love you! Let’s share Baby Shark’s love for family! Sing along and count from one to ten together!

programme.desc: Baby Shark, the beloved global star, is on the move! To meet fans from all around the world, Baby Shark is setting out on an exciting journey. Join the adventure and meet Baby Shark!

programme.title: Pinkfong Ninimo Nursery Rhymes

programme.title: Pinkfong Wonderstar
programme.desc: Jenni likes things that sparkle. But oops! Because Jenni shoved all these knick-knacks back in the closet, the door won't open again! Wonderstar persuades Jenni to decorate the threes outside with the sparkly stuff instead. Where did all my tools go?! The great inventor Poki's tools are keep disappearing. What! the screwdriver is gone! Oh well, my wrench just went missing too...

programme.title: Pinkfong Wonderstar
programme.desc: Quick delivery! Jordi's ice cream cart got stuck in mud. Help Jordi get the cheese ice cream in time before it melts. Let's go Wonderstars! Rachel sings Wonderville's super popular song 'Yum Yum Pie' and the friends shout for the encore! But nobody wants to hear the songs that Rachel wrote. Wonderstar suggests a concert with Rachel's amazing songs! Will they succeed?

programme.title: Pinkfong Wonderstar
programme.desc: Chumli got coverd in sticky acorn nut butter! Help me, Wonderstar! I have to wash it off before my body turns into a statue! Here's the mission! Find the missing bananas! The bananas that are supposed to be in Codi's cart are all gone. What happened? Codi finds Wonderstar for help.

programme.title: Bebefinn Playtime
programme.desc: Follow the fun-filled story of Shark Family and pick up numbers, colors, and cool ocean facts along the way! Are you ready? Let’s dive into the underwater adventure together!

programme.title: Pinkfong Children's Fairy Tales
programme.desc: A compilation of children's classic fairy tales.

programme.title: Pinkfong Children's Fairy Tales
programme.desc: A compilation of children's classic fairy tales.

programme.title: Pinkfong and Hogi’s Magic Adventure
programme.desc: "Once upon a time…There was a huge palace without a king. Only the true king of animals could be the ruler of this palace. Meanwhile, both the bear and the lion had their eyes on the throne. Who will become the true king of animals?"

programme.title: Farm Animals Songs
programme.desc: We invite you to Pinkfong Farm full of farm animals! From a fun color game to a number game! Everything is double the fun with farm animals!

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.title: We Are Firefighters
programme.desc: Today, we’re firefighters! Join Firefighter Pinkfong and learn what firefighters do. Emergency call! Let’s go!

programme.title: Elle - L'ultima Cenerentola
programme.desc: Un tempo Elle sognava di diventare una cantante famosa, ma ora vive a Los Angeles e lavora per un'etichetta discografica. Un giorno incontra il giovane Ty Parker, una stella del pop. Con l'aiuto dei suoi amici, Elle scoprirà che i sogni possono davvero diventare realtà.

programme.title: La programmazione riprenderà a breve
programme.desc: Ci stiamo concedendo un sonno riparatore per tornare più belli di prima! Resta sintonizzato e presto arriveranno altre proposte straordinarie di intrattenimento a cura di Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Dopo un assalto al feroce Anvis fallimentare, Gale elabora un piano ambizioso per sconfiggere l'astioso leader dei Rider Oscuri.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Gale fa un ultimo sforzo per fermare Anvis, ma presto Lute si rende conto che deve combattere per salvare il nuovo alleato dal baratro, con l'aiuto di tutti.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute e i suoi amici hanno di fronte a sé un intero mondo da esplorare e un futuro luminoso. Mikhail comprende il significato della Fratellanza ottenendo un Palico e uno scopo nella vita.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: I Rider del Villaggio di Hakum si preparano per indagare sul rapimento di Avinia da parte dei misteriosi Rider Oscuri. Che cosa vogliono da lei?

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Gale, dei Rider Oscuri, attacca Lute per prendergli la Gemma della Fratellanza. Visti i poteri del suo Monstie, la squadra parte per incontrare il Wyveriano, ovvero "L'Evocatore".

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Un altro membro degli Ebon Rider minaccia il nuovo Rider del Villaggio di Hakum, mentre Lute e i suoi amici incontrano un vecchio amico e scoprono il "Rito dell'Evocazione".

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Mentre cercano Avinia, Cheval e Cryo si imbattono in un altro Ebon Rider, Shadow, il cui Nargacuga si muove più veloce della luce.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Nariki, stanco da una sessione di allenamento e da una discussione con il suo Monstie, incontra inaspettatamente l'ultimo dei Quattro Sommi Rider Oscuri.

programme.title: Alpha & Omega
programme.desc: Due giovani lupi in contrasto l'uno con l'altro si trovano a doversi alleare per far fronte alla situazione sfavorevole nella quale sono finiti

programme.title: Team Hot Wheels: La nascita di un mito
programme.desc: Nella cittá piú tranquilla del mondo, quattro ragazzi fortunati scopriranno che la vita è piú divertente quando si va a tutto gas! Gage, Wyatt, Brandon e Rhett sono nati per correre. Da soli sono piloti abilissimi, ma insieme diventano Il Team Hot Wheels®!

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe
programme.desc: La vera storia di Robinson Crusoe raccontata dal pappagallo Venerdì che sull'isola è diventato il suo migliore amico.

programme.title: Air Bud 2 - Eroe a Quattro Zampe
programme.desc: Buddy ha un altro asso nella zampa — il football. Quando il padrone di Buddy improvvisamente diventa quarterback nella sua scuola, anche Buddy si ritrova nella mischia! L’accoppiata esplosiva di Buddy e Josh aiuta a portare i Timberwolves al Campionato statale.

programme.title: Jack Il Primate Più Verticale 2
programme.desc: Dopo essere stato cacciato dalla squadra di hockey, Jack incontra Ben, uno skateboarder ambizioso. Ben scopre che Jack è molto abile con lo skateboard e i due decidono di partecipare a una competizione di skateboard in giro per il paese!

programme.title: Air Buddies - Cuccioli Alla Riscossa
programme.desc: E' arrivata la nuova generazione del famoso franchise di successo Air Bud! Questa volta i protagonisti sono u cinque cuccioli di Air Bud, i Buddies, impegnati in una missione di salvataggio per salvare i loro genitori.

programme.title: A Plumm Summer - Una magica estate
programme.desc: Froggie Doo, pupazzo animato protagonista di un fortunato spettacolo televisivo, viene rapito. Due fratellini, Elliott e Rocky Plumm, aiutano l'FBI nelle indagini per recuperare il proprio eroe.

programme.title: Il tesoro di Whittmore
programme.desc: Albie e Tiffany vengono mandati a casa della zia per le vacanze. Qui i ragazzi conoscono un gruppo di bizzarri coetanei emarginati, impegnati nella ricerca di un fantomatico tesoro.

programme.title: Team Hot Wheels: La nascita di un mito
programme.desc: Nella cittá piú tranquilla del mondo, quattro ragazzi fortunati scopriranno che la vita è piú divertente quando si va a tutto gas! Gage, Wyatt, Brandon e Rhett sono nati per correre. Da soli sono piloti abilissimi, ma insieme diventano Il Team Hot Wheels®!

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: Chestnut - Un eroe a quattro zampe
programme.desc: Le giovani sorelle orfane Sal e Rae pensano di aver fatto centro quando trovano un adorabile cucciolo di alano il giorno stesso in cui vengono informate che saranno adottate... ma presto scopriranno che nel loro nuovo elegante appartamento a Manhattan i cani non sono ammessi.

programme.title: Ploi
programme.desc: Ploi è un pulcino di piviere che ha paura a spiccare il volo.

programme.title: Birba - Micio combinaguai
programme.desc: Un gatto di nome Oscar vive da tempo in un grattacielo in città con suo figlio Birba. Un giorno, incuriosito dal mondo esterno, Birba decide di uscire di casa ed avventurarsi alla ricerca di Miciolandia.

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Nessuno sa dove sia Chicky. Sappiamo solo che è carino e tanto ingenuo. In questa serie, seguite Chicky, l'uccellino dei cartoni animati, mentre si aggira intorno a un frigorifero, un tostapane, un copertone e tanti altri oggetti!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Nessuno sa dove sia Chicky. Sappiamo solo che è carino e tanto ingenuo. In questa serie, seguite Chicky, l'uccellino dei cartoni animati, mentre si aggira intorno a un puzzle, un trenino, un cestino e tanti altri oggetti!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Nessuno sa dove sia Chicky. Sappiamo solo che è carino e tanto ingenuo. In questa serie, seguite Chicky, l'uccellino dei cartoni animati, mentre si aggira intorno a una lampadina, una piastra, un Forza 4 e altri oggetti!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Chicky e Bekky suonano uno strumento a corde. Situazioni esilaranti e sorprese inaspettate per i nostri tre piccoli amici in questa compilation!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Chicky e Poyo saltano più e più volte da un divertente trampolino rosa. Situazioni esilaranti e sorprese inaspettate per i nostri tre piccoli amici in questa compilation!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Chicky e Bekky scoprono un oggetto divertente con dei quadrati illuminati. Situazioni esilaranti e sorprese inaspettate per i nostri tre piccoli amici in questa compilation!

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Quando Burbero pensa che il suo nascondiglio sia infestato, chiede aiuto agli orsetti. Gli orsetti non credono ai fantasmi… finché non si ritrovano faccia a faccia con uno! Solo quando Condivisione affronta le sue paure riescono a venire a capo di questa inquietante situazione!

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Gli Orsetti del Cuore decollano nello spazio dopo che un UFO gigante inizia a rubare tutta la cura proveniente dalla Terra. È la prima avventura galattica degli orsetti mentre respingono alieni sciocchi e cercano di salvare Tantamore prima che scompaia per sempre!

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Che i giochi abbiano inizio! Un malvagio mago di nome Senza Cuore mette gli Orsetti del Cuore contro la Banda dei Cattivi in una serie di giochi contorti. L'unica speranza degli orsetti è usare il potere della cura per battere Senza Cuore al suo stesso gioco!

programme.title: Big Baby
programme.desc: Uno scienziato progetta una macchina per la trasformazione genetica e il suo nipotino di soli 4 anni si trasforma accidentalmente in un uomo di 30. Il "Bambino" sfugge e corre intorno alla città rincorso dai fratelli che fanno di tutto per recuperarlo prima dell'arrivo dei propri genitori.

programme.title: Il regno di Wuba
programme.desc: Uomini e mostri non possono convivere in armonia: i primi, per paura o per diletto, finiranno sempre per andare a caccia dei secondi. Consapevole di questo, la Regina dei Mostri, incinta e minacciata di morte, fa di tutto per preservare la salute del nascituro.

programme.title: The Amazing Wizard Of Paws
programme.desc: Al compimento dei dodici anni, un ragazzo che soffre di ansia in modo patologico scopre che il suo cane ha seicento anni e che era stato precedentemente di proprietà di un potente mago.

programme.title: Team Hot Wheels: La nascita di un mito
programme.desc: Nella cittá piú tranquilla del mondo, quattro ragazzi fortunati scopriranno che la vita è piú divertente quando si va a tutto gas! Gage, Wyatt, Brandon e Rhett sono nati per correre. Da soli sono piloti abilissimi, ma insieme diventano Il Team Hot Wheels®!

programme.title: Alvin Superstar
programme.desc: La vita del musicista Dave Neville sta per essere sconvolta dall’arrivo di tre scoiattoli canterini: Alvin, Simon e Theodore. Tre forze della natura che, oltre a devastargli la casa, distruggergli la carriera e stravolgergli completamente la vita, si rivelano una band musicale strepitosa.

programme.title: Jack Il Primate Più Verticale 2
programme.desc: Dopo essere stato cacciato dalla squadra di hockey, Jack incontra Ben, uno skateboarder ambizioso. Ben scopre che Jack è molto abile con lo skateboard e i due decidono di partecipare a una competizione di skateboard in giro per il paese!

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie
programme.desc: Dopo essere stati sorpresi a rubare le risposte del test scolastico, i gemelli Zip e Zap sono costretti per punizione a trascorrere l’estate in un rigido istituto dove è vietato ogni tipo di divertimento.

programme.desc: A 2 hour run through, in order, of top 3 hits from the 90s - all with that rock n roll swagger! Expect plenty of U2, Def Leppard, Meat Loaf & Brit Pop!.

programme.title: The New Legends Of Rock
programme.desc: Rock Riffs, indie anthems and a new generation of rock legends from 2000 to now! Expect YungBlud, BMTH, The Arctic Monkeys, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.desc: Kick starting the festival season with an hour featuring some of the biggest names playing at this years Download Festival!

programme.title: The Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.desc: Turn up your spreakers to 11 and live life even louder! 50 All-Killer Anthems in order from Blink 182 in 2000 to The Killers at the end of the Decade!

programme.title: Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.desc: A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.title: Nicky Horne's Rock Party Anthems
programme.desc: Nicky Horne presents his favourite 30 rock party anthems of all time, featuring Led Zeppelin, Def Leppard, Thin Lizzy and David Bowie.

programme.title: Party Rock Anthems!
programme.desc: Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.

programme.title: Guns N' Roses: Rock Icons
programme.desc: An hour of Anthems and the biggest rock songs from rock legends Guns N' Roses!

programme.title: Kings & Queens: 2000 - NOW!
programme.desc: Starting in the 00s, bow before the royal rock stage! Home to the best front men and leading ladies that the world of rock has produced!

programme.title: 50 Rock Heroes of the 00s!
programme.desc: Claire Sturgess relives her 50 greatest heroes with the rock music that defined the 00s! Blink, MCR, Razorlight & Kings of Leon are all in the top 10 - but who's at number 1?

programme.title: Turn Up The 00s Anthems!

programme.title: Nicky Horne's Rock Party Anthems
programme.desc: Nicky Horne presents his favourite 30 rock party anthems of all time, featuring Led Zeppelin, Def Leppard, Thin Lizzy and David Bowie.

programme.title: NOW 100 Hits: Love Songs!
programme.desc: Simon Bates with the ultimate countdown of 80s love. Yes - 100 songs with heartfelt vocals, lush strings & big breakdowns in a 9 hour marathon! Expect Whitney, Lionel & George.

programme.title: Surely Not A Cover? Top 25
programme.desc: Some will really surprise you! 25 classic 80s hits that were all covers including Whitney, Madness, Tiffany & Simply Red.

programme.title: The NOW Yearbook 1982
programme.desc: Bruno Brookes with the year of the Kids from Fame and Eurovision's Bucks Fizz & Bardo! And we also first encountered future global superstars George Michael & Boy George.

programme.title: Wot? They Streamed a Billion?
programme.desc: What 80s songs have streamed over a billion times worldwide in the decades since? There are lots from Queen, Guns n Roses, Bon Jovi & AC/DC, but the top 3 might surprise you!

programme.title: Hits That Missed!
programme.desc: Lesser known songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!

programme.title: Make Mine A Double with Pat Sharp!
programme.desc: They says 2 heads are better than one & in the 80s the charts were full of collaborations. So pour a large one & have double the fun with Pat Sharp's top 40 duets.

programme.title: Hits That Missed!
programme.desc: Lesser known songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!

programme.title: Fashion Overload! 1980-1989
programme.desc: From shoulder pads & chunky pullovers to dodgy beards, suspect eyeshadow & hoop earrings - the 80s were a juggernaut of excess! Here are 40 videos which defined the era.

programme.title: WOW! What A Party!
programme.desc: A non-stop ticket to the ultimate retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.

programme.title: Limahl's Frocky Horror Show!
programme.desc: A cavalcade of clothing calamities & 'interesting choices' from superstars including Bowie, Madonna, Adam Ant, Bananarama, Queen, Wham, Five Star & maybe even Limahl himself!

programme.title: Where Did THAT Come From?! 80-89
programme.desc: These odd songs seemed to come from nowhere, but left a lasting mark - sometimes good, but often quite bad. Watch out for a chorus of frogs, male strippers...oh, and Su Pollard!

programme.title: The NOW Yearbook 1981
programme.desc: 1981 was another top year in music, with the New Romantics & Synth Pop conquering the world & changing the sound of the chart forever. Bruno Brookes has the story - month by month.

programme.title: Favorite Singers with Nick Heyward
programme.desc: Mr Favourite Shirts is back on NOW 80s - this time he selects his Favourite Singers! Including some who influenced him the most such as David Byrne & XTC's Andy Partridge.

programme.title: 1986 Unleashed!
programme.desc: Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights & iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1986!

programme.title: Every Song From NOW 7 - 1986
programme.desc: NOW 7 was released in 1986 and featured all the tracks of the moment. A double vinyl or double tape, the choice was yours - but the double CD had to wait until NOW 10!

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 30th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.desc: In this fast-paced episode, host Theresa Visintin uses two unlikely ingredients that start with the letter "G," garbanzo beans and grapefruit! First up, Theresa cooks socca, a savoury garbanzo bean pancake recipe, and infuses it with Mediterranean flavours. To make her batter, Theresa combines chickpea flour with salty olives, sweet red pepper, and fresh basil. Once the batter is ready to go, she fries the savoury crepe. Next up, Theresa balances tart grapefruit with a sweet buttery lobster tail. But that's not sweet enough for Theresa! She prepares sabayon, a delicate honey custard that melts in your mouth. Finally, Theresa shows us how to make a mouth-watering dish by combining...

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Chicken and corn are the key players in this letter “C” challenge. Chef Lauren Gulyas prepares one of her favourite Italian dishes, chicken Marsala. Using garlic, shallots, and white wine, Chef Lauren whips up a rich Marsala sauce that is nutty and floral in flavour. Next, she transforms corn into a creamy polenta topping for her Shepard’s pie...with a twist! Sautéing onion, garlic, and lean ground beef, she uses Worcestershire sauce and tomato paste to give the pie filling an extra flavour boost. Once she finishes those dishes, Chef Lauren creates a mouth-watering recipe that combines both chicken and corn.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: After picking the letter "L," Chef Robert Jewell takes on lamb and licorice in this ingredient challenge. He starts with aromatic Moroccan lamb riblets, an appetizer that will make you want this spicy dish as your main course too. Next, Robert takes it up a notch by showing us how to make licorice - yes, the candy! He brings coconut oil, brown sugar, creamed coconut, and molasses to boil before skillfully adding flour and anise to make sweet, chewy coconut licorice. Finally, Robert concocts the perfect recipe that combines succulent lamb with sweet licorice.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Host Theresa Visintin creates savoury meals in this letter "R" challenge featuring radicchios and raisins. First, Theresa chops up bold and bitter radicchios, grilling them until the edges are a crispy golden brown and perfect for a warm wedge salad. Then, she tosses fried pancetta and earthy portobello mushrooms in a luxurious champagne vinegar and pours it over the crispy radicchio. Theresa tops this warm salad with creamy crumbled goat's cheese. For her next dish, Theresa prepares a rum raisin sauce using golden sultana raisins, dark rum, and fresh orange. Theresa pours the sauce over succulent ham. Is your mouth watering yet? Finally, Theresa combines radicchio and raisin into a...

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: It's all about pork and peanuts, today's challenge is the letter "P." Chef Lauren Gulyas serves up an old school favourite, smothered pork chops. Using a blend of savoury ingredients, and with the help of her cast iron pan, Chef Lauren provides us with tips on how to keep your pork tender and tasty. Next, it's time for a West African peanut soup. Drizzling garlic, ginger and onions with extra virgin olive oil and letting them sizzle in a frying pan until the onions are soft brings out a sweetness that lends itself beautifully to the salty, earthy taste of peanuts. To finish, Chef Lauren puts an Asian twist on a southern classic, when she combines the two ingredients.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Say goodbye to dirty cutlery in this One World Kitchen 3 episode featuring Vietnamese finger foods! Talented cook Lisa Nguyen starts off by making delicious Pork Skewer Rolls - perfect for any party! Featuring tender pork, crispy lettuce, fresh mint, crunchy cucumber, and Chinese chives wrapped in soft rice paper, this dish pairs well with a nuoc cham dipping sauce. Sticky Lemongrass Spare Ribs are next up to the plate; steamed and marinated in a garlicy, caramel glaze (yum!). Next, Lisa fries up some tasty Shrimp and Sweet Potato Fritters using a foolproof technique, adding nuoc cham dipping sauce and lovely Bibb lettuce on the side. Finally, fingERS-licking Vietnamese Coffee Cupcakes...
